scripts.build: mkdir -p ../temp && cp -r . ../temp/wc-payment-monitor && cd ../temp && zip -r wc-payment-monitor.zip wc-payment-monitor -x "wc-payment-monitor/tests/*" "wc-payment-monitor/vendor/*" "wc-payment-monitor/*.git*" "wc-payment-monitor/*.DS_Store" "wc-payment-monitor/Makefile" "wc-payment-monitor/docker-compose.yml" "wc-payment-monitor/Dockerfile.tests" "wc-payment-monitor/*.md" "wc-payment-monitor/phpcs.xml" "wc-payment-monitor/phpmd.xml" "wc-payment-monitor/phpstan.neon" "wc-payment-monitor/phpunit.xml" "wc-payment-monitor/codeception.yml" "wc-payment-monitor/run-tests.sh" "wc-payment-monitor/install-wp-tests.sh" "wc-payment-monitor/composer.*" "wc-payment-monitor/LICENSE" "wc-payment-monitor/docs/*" "wc-payment-monitor/examples/*" "wc-payment-monitor/.*/*" "wc-payment-monitor/package.json" "wc-payment-monitor/*.cache" && mv wc-payment-monitor.zip ../sentinel/ && cd ../sentinel && rm -rf ../temp
